notes: install.sh fully implements all 3 modes (install/update/uninstall). POSIX sh compliant, no bashisms. CLAUDE_DIR override works. Conflict detection, --force flag, atomic manifest writes, CLAUDE.md tag management all verified. 26/26 acceptance criteria met.

A1: Subshell variable loss in update removal counting — dual-loop pattern works but fragile. A2: JSON array built via string concatenation — technically unsafe for special chars but controlled filenames mitigate. A3: config.sh not sourced — intentional, documented, install.sh doesn't call its functions. A4: CLAUDE.md append path not atomic (uses >> instead of temp+mv like the replacement path).
